appraisal_events.evidence: Cette petite scène ... enchantait les amis ... comme une preuve de la séduisante originalité de la « Patronne » et de sa sensibilité musicale.
appraisal_events.explanation: The salon collectively treats Mme Verdurin’s recurring outburst as delightful evidence of her originality and musical feeling, locally elevating her standing, though the narrator hints at irony by stressing the scene’s repetitiveness.

status_effects.explanation: Within the group, she gains prestige as the admired, theatrically sensitive leader whose ‘scene’ becomes an anticipated highlight.
